title: GK1H Extras
description: Mod with miscellaneous changes and additions made by GK1H.
body:
Mod with miscellaneous changes and additions made by GK1H.

Features

Wet sponges being added to fishing junk loot.
Ender dragon drops dragon head.
Blocking with mace. (Requires Sword Blocking Mechanics.)
Fix for owls from Ender Zoology being too loud by setting volume to what it is in later versions.

Links

CurseForge
